prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, payments, and admin analytics.
Build a learning management system for teachers and students with assignments and grading.
Build an inventory management system with suppliers, stock tracking, and sales reports.
Build a hospital management system with appointments, doctors, patients, and billing.
Build a blogging platform with authentication, comments, and categories.
Build a food delivery application with restaurants, orders, payments, and tracking.
Build a project management platform with tasks, deadlines, teams, and dashboards.
Build a fitness tracking application with workouts, progress analytics, and subscriptions.
Build an e-commerce platform with products, carts, payments, and order history.
Build a chat application with authentication, rooms, and message history.
Build me something cool.
Build an app with no login but role-based access.
Build a platform that is both fully public and completely private.
Build an app.
Create a dashboard with analytics but no data storage.
Build a payment system without users.
Build a multiplayer game with no players.
Build a social media app with messaging but no authentication.
Build a banking app where everyone has admin access.
Build a school management system but do not store students.
